children.text: The Civil Air Patrol is a nonprofit corporation that is federally chartered under .section 40301 of title 36
Except as provided in , the Civil Air Patrol is not an instrumentality of the Federal Government for any purpose.section 9492(b)(2) of this title

children.heading: .—Purposes
children.label: b .—Purposes
children.text: The purposes of the Civil Air Patrol are set forth in .section 40302 of title 36
